name: describe_vlm_local
comment: Scene description via a LOCAL mlx-vlm Qwen vision server on Apple silicon. Start it first: bench/metal/run_mlx_vlm_server.sh (serves Qwen3.5-2B on :8080, OpenAI-compatible; it strips the MTP weights mlx-vlm can't load yet). Set the 'model' below to what the server reports at GET /v1/models (the local mtp-stripped dir path, e.g. .../bench/models/Qwen3.5-2B-OptiQ-4bit-nomtp). describe_vlm POSTs a decoded RGB frame (JPEG) every interval_sec and emits a DESCRIPTION event. Validated on M4 Pro: ~4s/frame for the 2B at 720p, fully offline.

cfg.prompt: Describe this security-camera scene in one short sentence. Note any people or vehicles.
